name: virune-vscode
description: Syntax highlighting and language support for the Virune programming language.

virune.inlayHints.variableTypes.enabled.description: Show inferred types for local and top-level variables.

virune.inlayHints.functionReturnTypes.en.description: Show inferred return types for functions and lambdas without an explicit return type.

enumDescriptions: Do not show parameter name hints.
Show parameter names for literal-like arguments.
Show parameter names for all arguments except matching identifiers.
virune.inlayHints.parameterNames.description: Controls parameter name hints at function call sites.

virune.inlayHints.forLoopVariableTypes.e.description: Show inferred types for for-loop variables.

virune.inlayHints.lambdaParameterTypes.e.description: Show inferred types for lambda parameters.

virune.hover.showEffects.description: Show uses capabilities in function hover information.

virune.hover.showModule.description: Show the defining source file in hover information.
